## Summary

- Describe the change and why it belongs in this public repo.

## Validation

- [ ] `steward probe --json --profile quick`
- [ ] `dart pub get`
- [ ] `cd core_packages/ecsly && dart analyze && dart test`
- [ ] Focused package tests for changed companion packages:

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated when behavior, setup, packages, or workflows changed
- [ ] Release notes/changelog path considered for user-facing changes
- [ ] Contributor credit updated when appropriate
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private URLs added
- [ ] Public claims stay scoped to packages present in this repo
